title: See orphaned boards and automations on ownership pages
excerpt: As an admin, I would like to be able to see the orphaned boards in the board ownership page, and the orphaned automations in the automations ownership page, so that when I transfer ownership, I know what I am transferrin…

posts.author: jonliss (Jon Liss)
posts.cookedHtml: As an admin, I would like to be able to see the orphaned boards in the board ownership page, and the orphaned automations in the automations ownership page, so that when I transfer ownership, I know what I am transferring to the new owner.
